summary: Spec closeout review approved for GH-103 closeout branch head a45d1cb1b5621211d61a5cd9cc03a49c6308e83c. PR #123 already merged the Core-only static Lode package/resource admission slice, and this closeout-only change records terminal carrier evidence without changing runtime behavior.
reviewed_validation_summary: GH-103 validation and merge evidence passed on 2026-07-01 UTC: `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/core-runtime typecheck`; `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/core-runtime test`; `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/schemas test`; `pnpm conformance`; `pnpm build`; `pnpm typecheck`; `pnpm lint`; `pnpm test`; `git diff --check`; `jq empty .loom/bootstrap/init-result.json .loom/specs/GH-103/build-evidence.json .loom/reviews/GH-103.json .loom/reviews/GH-103.spec.json`; `loom doctor --target . --json`; `loom verify --target . --json`; `loom fact-chain --target . --json`; `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-103 --json`; `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-103 --json`; `loom suite evidence validate --target . --item GH-103 --json`; source-runtime packaged build attempt `GH-103-build-7b5657364511-3f9de0061abc`; packaged pre-review attempt `GH-103-pre-review-aa6f923112ae-40e8bba1770c`; packaged spec-review attempt `GH-103-spec-review-40eb9c5c841d-faf064836ced`; packaged implementation review attempt `GH-103-review-40eb9c5c841d-fcf1e6cd5a8f`; packaged merge-ready attempt `GH-103-merge-ready-cae8da522778-113a512f265d`; PR #123 metadata preflight passed for `merge_ready` and final head `cae8da522778adad2d0697fdd3f21876d381f018`; hosted `py-compile`, `demo-bootstrap`, `repo-local-cli`, `loom-check`, and `loom-pr-merge-gate` passed on PR #123 in run `28553336813`; PR #123 merged into `main` as `a45d1cb1b5621211d61a5cd9cc03a49c6308e83c`. Earlier attempts exposed carrier ownership, Blockers-field, installed-runtime suite JSON, review-readiness-summary, retained validation-summary, and checkpoint-state drift; these were classified as carrier/runtime metadata defects and fixed before merge. Review-readiness source-distribution tools are not applicable to this consumer repo because there is no `tools/` directory and `tools/skills_surface.py check`, `tools/loom_check.py --profile source --source-surface contract-only`, `tools/check_release_surface.py`, `tools/version_surface_check.py`, and `tools/check_npm_package.py` are absent. Issue closeout remains pending until this post-merge carrier sync is merged; FR #95 remains open until GH-104 and GH-105 are complete.
